elements.text: Mid-day sun beats down mercilessly into the Scarred Gorge, baking the dry clay. Lyra stands atop a fractured stone pillar, her posture rigid as an unsheathed blade. Below her, a dozen elders of the traditionalist sects gather in the shadow of the monoliths, their hands resting cautiously on the hilts of their ancestral swords.
You carve your laws into the very bones of this valley, yet you tremble because a scavenger from the lowest depths knows how to lay a trap?

The elders stir uneasily. One of them, his beard white and eyes heavy with caution, steps forward. He mutters of Kaelen's swift, brutal efficiency—how the local strongman fell without Kaelen taking a single blow.

A victory without martial confrontation is not a victory—it is a theft! He bypassed the trial, he bypassed the blood, and you call it efficient? If we accept his shortcut, we admit that our entire lives, our discipline, our ancestors' sacrifices, are nothing but foolish vanity.
elements.expression: her voice rising, cutting through the dry wind

elements.text: A murmur of uncomfortable agreement ripples through the crowd. The white-bearded elder shakes his head, whispering of the consequences. Kaelen's reputation is growing; to oppose him openly is to invite a ruthless, unpredictable retaliation.

Then let him retaliate! Let him bring his poisons and his pragmatism to these heights. Let him see what happens when his tricks meet a wall of true resolve. If we do not block his ascent now, if we do not deny him the northern arteries and the spirit-veins, we surrender the sword-way to the shadows.
elements.expression: stepping to the very edge of the pillar, looking down at them

elements.text: The elders look at one another, the weight of her conviction pressing down on their hesitation. Slowly, the white-bearded elder draws his sword halfway from its scabbard, the steel catching the harsh mid-day light. One by one, the others follow, their faces hardening with a shared, stubborn pride.
Close the passes. Seal the lower boundaries. Let us see how far his cleverness carries him when the mountain itself refuses to yield.
elements.expression: resolute, her gaze fixed on the horizon where Kaelen's shadow looms
